title: Melted Buttery Canadian Chicken Wrap
description: A comforting Canadian dish featuring juicy chicken, melted Monterey Jack cheese, and a hint of butter, all wrapped in a steamed leaf wrap, perfect for a sick day pick-me-up
instructions: Preheat a large skillet over medium heat
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned and cooked through
Add the garlic powder, salt, and black pepper to the skillet and stir to combine
Butter one side of each lettuce leaf
Place a cooked chicken strip onto the unbuttered side of each lettuce leaf
Top each chicken strip with a slice of Monterey Jack cheese
Fold the lettuce leaves over the filling to create a wrap
Steam the wraps for 2-3 minutes to melt the cheese
Serve the wraps hot and enjoy
